_note: Maps Jira issues -> consuming department(s) for the per-group reports. Resolution order in group_report.py: (1) each issue label via label_to_dept, (2) issue's parent/epic key via epic_to_dept (children inherit; Jira labels do NOT inherit from parent), (3) explicit key_overrides. Results are unioned, so an issue can belong to multiple departments. Labels in ignore_labels are intake/process noise, not departments. Maintain this file by hand; correct it once when the report mis-buckets something and it stops drifting.
_project_note: Whole-project routing applied by issue key prefix. TDDE (Domo Data Engineering) -> a dedicated 'Domo' report that goes to its owners (Craig + Adam), rather than scattering ~40 mostly finance/HR dashboard tickets across Supply Chain/Ecommerce. Revisit once TDDE items carry consuming-department labels.

_epic_notes.TTD-109/TTD-94: Order Entry app / Milestone 4 (labeled Sales); sub-tasks TTD-59/90/91/267/268 unlabeled.
_epic_notes.TTD-216: Auto PO (labeled Supply_Chain); children TTD-222/223 dropship+replenishment automation unlabeled.
_epic_notes.TTD-238: EIM multiselect refactor (labeled Supply_Chain); child TTD-239 unlabeled.
_epic_notes.NA-189: PO custom pricing for EDI (unlabeled parent); children NA-190/191/192/193. Supply-chain per projects.md.
_epic_notes.NA-39: EDI epic (unlabeled); child NA-149 EDI item-list review.
_epic_notes.NA-251: FedEx Dallas / Shiphawk carrier setup (unlabeled); child NA-254. Shipping = Operations.
_epic_notes.NA-234: Saved-search email scheduler feeding Domo (unlabeled); children NA-238/239/240. Internal Technology/Domo, not a business dept.
_epic_notes.skipped: Accounting & Ecommerce have no unlabeled-child epics — labels cover them. NA admin parents (NA-16/20/42/73/...) are IT-internal plumbing, intentionally left unmapped so they don't clutter business reports. NA-263 promo (Sales vs Ecommerce) left unmapped pending a call.

_admin_note: High-confidence recommendations from the 2026-06-16 NA triage. These NetSuite-admin (NA) tickets are NOT yet labeled in Jira; the generator surfaces them in the recommended department's report under a separate 'Admin (pending tagging)' heading, kept out of the main scorecard. They graduate to a normal label_to_dept member once the admin team tags them (target: Fri 2026-06-19). Only High-confidence items are included; Medium/Low stay in the worksheet only.
_domo_note: First-pass cross-functional routing for TDDE (Domo) tickets. Every TDDE item is in the standalone 'Domo' report (project_to_dept). Items here ALSO fold into the related group's report under a 'Domo' heading. Finance/HR/internal Domo items (e.g. Attendance, P&C BI, token optimization) intentionally stay Domo-only. Refine once TDDE carries consuming-dept labels.
